# iStack

> iStack is an independent mobile app publisher shipping 45 apps on Google Play and the Apple App Store across productivity, AI photo, utilities, health, education, personalization, and voice. 419,000+ total installs, 4.6★ average rating. All apps are free to download. Android apps are ad-supported with no in-app purchases or subscriptions. iOS apps are free to install with optional premium features via in-app purchase or subscription.

## Key facts

- Publisher: iStack
- Site: https://istack.cc
- Contact: contact@istack.cc
- Total apps: 45 (43 Android, 7 iOS, some on both)
- Total installs: 419,000+
- Average rating: 4.6 / 5
- Pricing (Android): Free, ad-supported. No in-app purchases, no subscriptions, no account required.
- Pricing (iOS): Free to download. Optional in-app purchases and subscriptions unlock premium features on select apps.
- Privacy: Most apps work fully offline and keep data on-device.
- Last updated: April 2026

## Categories

- [Productivity](https://istack.cc/category/productivity/)
- [AI & Photo](https://istack.cc/category/ai-photo/)
- [Utilities](https://istack.cc/category/utilities/)
- [Health & Fitness](https://istack.cc/category/health/)
- [Education](https://istack.cc/category/education/)
- [Personalization](https://istack.cc/category/personalization/)
- [Voice & Commands](https://istack.cc/category/voice-commands/)

## Apps

- [PDF Scanner](https://istack.cc/apps/pdf-scanner/): Free Android app that scans documents, converts photos to PDF, and extracts text with OCR — fully offline.
- [Home Workout](https://istack.cc/apps/home-workout/): No-equipment fitness plans for Android with guided routines for strength, fat loss, and consistency.
- [NFC Card Reader](https://istack.cc/apps/nfc-card-reader/): Scans compatible NFC cards and manages card information in a secure wallet experience for Android.
- [Document Reader](https://istack.cc/apps/document-reader/): Opens Word and office files on Android with a lightweight, fast-reading interface.
- [Office Reader](https://istack.cc/apps/office-reader/): All-in-one document viewer for PDFs and office files with smooth navigation on Android.
- [Signature Maker](https://istack.cc/apps/signature-maker/): Create digital signatures and sign PDF files on Android for forms and approvals.
- [Forms](https://istack.cc/apps/forms/): Third-party Google Forms manager for Android with AI-assisted form generation.
- [Gimin - AI Photo Editor](https://istack.cc/apps/gimin/): AI-powered photo editor for iOS — polaroid generator, cartoon filters, professional headshots.
- [Transparency: Magic Eraser](https://istack.cc/apps/transparency/): Remove backgrounds with AI on iOS and export clean transparent PNGs in one tap.
- [Hair Cut - Color Changer](https://istack.cc/apps/hair-cut/): Try any hairstyle or hair color in seconds using AI on iOS.
- [Math AI](https://istack.cc/apps/math-ai/): Scan math problems with your camera and get step-by-step answers on iOS.
- [Sweet Camera](https://istack.cc/apps/sweet-camera/): Beauty selfie camera for Android with real-time filters and skin smoothing.
- [Photo Collage](https://istack.cc/apps/photo-collage/): Create photo grids and collages with 500+ layouts for Android.
- [Time Warp Scan](https://istack.cc/apps/time-warp-scan/): Create trending warp effects and distortions with a scan-line camera on Android.
- [Cut Paste Photo](https://istack.cc/apps/cut-paste-photo/): Background removal and object cutout tools for creative photo edits on Android.
- [Sticker Maker](https://istack.cc/apps/sticker-maker/): Convert photos into custom stickers for WhatsApp and other chat apps on Android.
- [Photo Vault](https://istack.cc/apps/photo-vault/): Secure private photos behind a calculator-style lock with AES encryption on Android.
- [GPS Photo](https://istack.cc/apps/gps-photo/): Add location, date, and map stamps to photos for geotag documentation on Android.
- [Speed Test](https://istack.cc/apps/speed-test/): Measure internet download, upload, and ping performance in real time on Android.
- [Speaker Cleaner](https://istack.cc/apps/speaker-cleaner/): Play tuned frequencies to eject water and improve muffled speaker output on Android.
- [Guitar Tuner](https://istack.cc/apps/guitar-tuner/): Accurate chromatic tuning for guitar and string instruments on Android.
- [AR Measure](https://istack.cc/apps/ar-measure/): Use your camera to measure object lengths and room dimensions on Android.
- [Mirror](https://istack.cc/apps/mirror/): Quick front camera mirror with optional light tools for Android.
- [Color Picker](https://istack.cc/apps/color-picker/): Detect and identify colors from camera input and images on Android.
- [GPS Speedometer](https://istack.cc/apps/speedometer/): Track speed, distance, and trip metrics for driving and outdoor travel on Android.
- [Screen Mirroring](https://istack.cc/apps/screen-mirroring/): Cast your Android screen to compatible TVs via Miracast.
- [Hearing Amplifier](https://istack.cc/apps/hearing-amplifier/): Boost environmental sound for clearer distant or quiet audio on Android.
- [Compass](https://istack.cc/apps/compass/): Reliable GPS-assisted direction tools for navigation on Android.
- [Live Earth Map](https://istack.cc/apps/live-earth/): Satellite-style map views and location tools for exploration on Android.
- [TCG Scanner](https://istack.cc/apps/tcg-scanner/): Scan trading cards and track collection value on iOS.
- [Currency Converter & Calc](https://istack.cc/apps/currency-converter/): Convert 180+ currencies with real-time rates and offline support on iOS.
- [AI Tanning & UV Index](https://istack.cc/apps/ai-tanning/): Safe tanning planner with live UV status, SPF advice, and guided tanning timer on iOS.
- [Font Generator](https://istack.cc/apps/font-generator/): Create stylish text for social bios and captions with decorative font styles on Android.
- [Watch Faces](https://istack.cc/apps/watch-faces/): Minimalist Wear OS watch face designs for Android smartwatches.
- [Funky Smiles](https://istack.cc/apps/funky-smiles/): Animated live wallpapers and playful visual themes for Android.
- [Kawaii Wallpaper](https://istack.cc/apps/kawaii-wallpaper/): Cute HD backgrounds for aesthetic phone customization on Android.
- [Birthday Cards](https://istack.cc/apps/birthday-cards/): Design birthday wishes with templates, frames, and animated greeting styles on Android.
- [Wedding Invitation](https://istack.cc/apps/wedding-invitation/): Design elegant invitation cards with customizable text and layouts on Android.
- [Neon Clock](https://istack.cc/apps/smart-clock/): Live wallpaper clock visuals and glowing time displays for Android.
- [Edge Lighting](https://istack.cc/apps/edge-lighting/): Animated edge effects and border glow for Android notifications and screens.
- [LED Banner](https://istack.cc/apps/led-scroller/): Scrolling text display for events, messages, and attention-grabbing signs on Android.
- [Home Design 3D](https://istack.cc/apps/house-design/): Sketch floor plans and visualize room layouts for home projects on Android.
- [Step Counter](https://istack.cc/apps/step-counter/): Track daily steps, distance, and activity trends with a clean pedometer on Android.
- [Translate](https://istack.cc/apps/speak-translate/): Voice translation and camera text scanning for multilingual conversations on Android.
- [Voice Commands](https://istack.cc/apps/voice-commands/): Trigger assistant actions with command presets and voice workflows on Android.
